title: Orumbella macounii

taxonomy: Orumbella macounii is a species of fungus, specifically a member of the genus Orumbella, which belongs to the family Pyronemataceae. This fungus is classified within the phylum Ascomycota, which is a large group of fungi characterized by their asci and ascospores. At the kingdom level, Orumbella macounii is classified as Fungi, indicating its membership in the fungal kingdom. The classification further breaks down to the domain level, where Orumbella macounii falls under Eukarya, signifying its eukaryotic cell structure. Its classification is also supported by molecular phylogenetic studies that confirm its placement within the Pyronemataceae family.
